title: Vance-led team lands in Pak’s Nur Khan base, same air hub targeted by India during Op Sindoor
summary_full: US Vice President JD Vance and an Iranian delegation arrived at Pakistan's Nur Khan airbase for peace talks. This base, a key Pakistani military hub, was reportedly targeted by Indian missile strikes last May. The US delegation's choice of the airbase highlights its strategic importance and proximity to Islamabad, despite past damage.
